heading: Omitted
label: 459e–8 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for the creation of a Fire Island National Seashore Advisory Commission, has been omitted as executed in view of a provision of subsec. (a) that the Commission terminate on , or on the declaration of the establishment of the Fire Island National Seashore, whichever occurs first.Pub.
